meta.title: Xenon Trade & Contracting | Fire Safety & Security Systems — Egypt
meta.description: Leading Egyptian company specializing in fire alarm systems, sprinkler systems, CCTV, access control, and electrical contracting. 14+ years of experience, 150+ projects.

about.title: About Xenon
about.subtitle: Protecting Egypt since 2012
about.slogan: Your Trusted Partner in Fire Safety & Security Solutions
about.story: Xenon Trade & Contracting is one of Egypt's leading companies in the field of technological development. The company operates with a high level of expertise in electrical works, mechanical works, low-current systems, and various network installations. We are dedicated to competing in the market by delivering high-quality technological solutions at competitive prices, completing all projects according to international codes and industry standards.
about.missionText: To provide integrated fire safety and security solutions with the highest international standards, delivering exceptional value to our clients across Egypt.
about.visionText: To be Egypt's most trusted provider of integrated fire safety and security solutions.
about.t2012: Company founded by Eng. Mina Wagdy
about.t2014: First major bank project — National Bank of Egypt
about.t2016: Wadi Degla Clubs partnership begins across multiple branches
about.t2020: Expansion to Alexandria — Police Hospital, Al-Najjar Clinics
about.t2022: Electronic invoice registration and customs clearance certification
about.qualityDesc: We deliver excellence in every project through meticulous attention to detail and premium materials
about.safetyDesc: Safety is our core business — we protect lives and assets with unwavering commitment
about.innovationDesc: We stay at the forefront of fire safety and security technology
about.complianceDesc: Full adherence to NFPA, UL/FM, and Egyptian regulatory standards
about.founderBio: With a strong background in engineering, Eng. Mina Wagdy founded Xenon Trade & Contracting in 2012 with a vision to elevate fire safety and security standards across Egypt. Under his leadership, the company has grown to complete 150+ projects across banking, healthcare, industrial, and commercial sectors.
